name: collab-editor
description: Real-time collaborative document editor with MongoDB, Socket.IO, and React

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.clean: cd backend && rmdir /s /q node_modules && cd ../frontend && rmdir /s /q node_modules
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
